title: Product Manager, Growth - Google Pay
tip_to_score: This role directly aligns with your 5+ years in Product Growth. Lead with your 2.3% revenue uplift story from Meta Reels monetization and your experience scaling ByteDance TikTok Shop for SMBs. Emphasize your cross-functional leadership across engineering, design, and data science teams.

title: Strategy & Operations Manager, Google Cloud India
tip_to_score: Leverage your ByteDance experience managing the Indian market expansion and your startup co-founding story to demonstrate market strategy chops. Your GenZ audience expertise and non-technical PM background are differentiators for this ops-heavy role.

title: Strategy and Operations Lead, GBO Tools
role_summary: Lead strategy and operations for Google Business Operations tools, combining management consulting-style strategic thinking with program management to drive operational improvements and business outcomes.
why_good_fit: Your structured half-planning methodology at Meta (identifying market needs, defining levers, setting milestones), your experience building business cases and opportunity sizing for product teams, and your cross-functional execution across multiple stakeholders align with the strategy and operations mandate. Your ability to zoom in on operational details (SMB enforcement resolution mapping) and zoom out on strategic direction (Shoppertainment as India monetisation big bet, TikTok re-entry strategy at CPO level) demonstrates the range this role likely requires. Your 7+ years across ByteDance and Meta in roles that blend strategy, market analysis, and execution partnership provide relevant experience.
how_to_win: Frame your Meta IPGS role as fundamentally a strategy and operations function — you identified market opportunities, built business cases, secured buy-in, and drove execution across teams. Lead with the SMB enforcement project as a case study in end-to-end strategy-to-operations impact (discovery → analysis → pitch → policy change → new team creation → 2.3% revenue uplift). Prepare to discuss your half-planning process as a structured strategic planning framework. Address the consulting/advisory angle by highlighting how you've served as an internal strategic advisor to product teams. Note: this role may not be AI-native enough for your P0 criteria — evaluate carefully whether the tools/AI component is central or peripheral.
key_requirements: Bachelor's degree or equivalent practical experience
6 years of experience in management consulting, business strategy, corporate advisory, or program management
